EMMANUELLA.DESRUISSEAUX.IS.A.CREATIVE.BASED.IN.MASSACHUSETTS.CURRENTLY.A.SENIOR.AT.RICE.UNIVERSITY.SHE.IS.PIQUED.BY.THE.INTERSECTION.OF.ART.AND.TECHNOLOGY.SHE.HAS.EXPRERIENCE.WORKING.ON.PIECES.FOR.EXHIBITIONS.AND.PERSONAL.PROJECTS.FOLLOW.ALONG.TO.SEE.WHAT.SHE.DOES.NEXT.EMMANUELLA.DESRUISSEAUX.IS.A.CREATIVE.BASED.IN.MASSACHUSETTS.CURRENTLY.A.SENIOR.AT.RICE.UNIVERSITY.SHE.IS.PIQUED.BY.THE.INTERSECTION.OF.ART.AND.TECHNOLOGY.SHE.HAS.EXPRERIENCE.WORKING.ON.PIECES.FOR.EXHIBITIONS.AND.PERSONAL.PROJECTS.FOLLOW.ALONG.TO.SEE.WHAT.SHE.DOES.NEXT.EMMANUELLA.DESRUISSEAUX.IS.A.CREATIVE.BASED.IN.MASSACHUSETTS.CURRENTLY.A.SENIOR.AT.RICE.UNIVERSITY.SHE.IS.PIQUED.BY.THE.INTERSECTION.OF.ART.AND.TECHNOLOGY.SHE.HAS.EXPRERIENCE.WORKING.ON.PIECES.FOR.EXHIBITIONS.AND.PERSONAL.PROJECTS.FOLLOW.ALONG.TO.SEE.WHAT.SHE.DOES.NEXT.


About

In my free time: I play volleyball, go on runs (prefer outdoor because treadmill gets so boring at times, and lift some weights in the gym. I'm training to be the most athletic person in the world. Less physical: I love to read books and also plan to write my own one day, or one of these years (hopefully by the time I'm 40). I'm also really good at cooing and baking, but I absolutely don't like either. It's such a draining process at times. I'm also passionate about so many things, causes, and possibilities. If there's anything cool going on the world I would love to know so please email me about some fun things!

Art Projects


I don't often make physical art projects, but when I do, I typically tend to make them weird of some sort. My favoirte ones are scary looking projects because scary things tend to make people feel emotions. I hope to evoke some sort of emotion to people as they look at my art. I also have my 'nostalgic' pieces that help people (and me) remember certain events, situations, or things.


Tech Projects

When I was a computer science major, my first 2 years of college, I focused a lot on creating personal projects with a focus of using coding languages such as python, Flask, java, etc. Tech projects allowed me to further my skills and apply tech to real life projects. But my goal was to create projects that could help society like my SMS app that helps people identify unknown phone numbers for safety purposes.




Should I reply SMS App

Creative Tech

In all honestly, most of the work I've done can fall under creative tech. I believe in the importance of inntersecting art and technology as it allows people to connect more with the work you create. This work of mine is still developing to this day. A lot of what I've done in this field relates to user experience/interaction. I do have some of the work I've done hosted on another portfolio that goes into great detail about these projects which I have linked below.




What does creative tech look like?

Exhibitions

During my academic career at Rice I have had the opportunity do work on some very cool exhibitions. The two I featured below actually my sparked my interest in the combination of technology and art. I have also done an exhibit where I used projection mapping onto an art piece for a show I was invited into in February. Unfortunately I had some hardware errors and lost all personal existence of this project.



A Bug's Life
The Flocking

Upcoming Work

Stay tuned for what's to come!
